notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS. It addresses 30 CVEs: CVE-2025-38349, CVE-2025-40248, CVE-2025-40258, CVE-2025-40294, CVE-2025-68301, and 25 more.
